name: telegram-remote-claw
displayName: GitHub Copilot Mobile – Telegram Remote Claw
description: Control VS Code and GitHub Copilot remotely via your personal Telegram bot.

chatParticipants.name: remoteclaw
chatParticipants.description: Ask GitHub Copilot questions and control VS Code via Telegram

telegramCopilot.instanceName.description: Friendly name for this VS Code instance, shown in Telegram notifications.

telegramCopilot.enableTerminal.description: Allow the /run command to execute terminal commands remotely.

telegramCopilot.enableScreenshots.description: Allow the /screenshot command to capture and send desktop images.

telegramCopilot.confirmDestructive.description: Require inline keyboard confirmation before executing destructive terminal commands.

telegramCopilot.commandAllowlist.description: If non-empty, only these commands are permitted via /run. Takes precedence over commandDenylist.

telegramCopilot.commandDenylist.description: Commands that trigger a confirmation prompt or are blocked when issued via /run.

telegramCopilot.notifyOnBuildComplete.description: Send a Telegram message when a VS Code build task completes.

telegramCopilot.notifyOnTestComplete.description: Send a Telegram message when a test run completes.

telegramCopilot.notifyOnLongTask.description: Send a Telegram message when a running task exceeds longTaskThresholdSeconds.

telegramCopilot.longTaskThresholdSeconds.description: Seconds before a running task is considered long and a notification is sent.

telegramCopilot.terminalOutputMaxLines.description: Maximum terminal output lines before the response is truncated.

telegramCopilot.conversationHistoryCount.description: Number of Copilot conversation exchanges to persist across VS Code restarts.

telegramCopilot.messageFormat.description: Telegram message parse mode. Use 'markdown' or 'html'.

telegramCopilot.autoScreenshotAfterAgent.description: Automatically send a screenshot to Telegram after every Copilot response.

telegramCopilot.rateLimitPerMinute.description: Maximum commands per minute accepted from the owner before rate limiting kicks in.

telegramCopilot.enablePIN.description: Require the owner to send /auth <pin> once per VS Code session before commands are accepted.

telegramCopilot.silentMode.description: When true, /ask answers without opening the VS Code Chat panel (calls the LM directly). Overridden by nativeChatCapture.

telegramCopilot.nativeChatCapture.description: When true, /ask opens the native VS Code Chat panel with the bare query (no @remoteclaw participant) and captures the response via clipboard automation. Takes precedence over silentMode.

telegramCopilot.nativeChatCaptureTimeout.description: Maximum seconds to wait for a native chat response when nativeChatCapture is enabled.

telegramCopilot.nativeChatMonitorInactiv.description: Minutes of no new Telegram sends before the chat monitor stops automatically.
